name: Dex McHenry
text: If you like brutalist WW2: concrete then this is a place for you. No public access to the interior but you can walk around three sides of the exterior. Classic Nazi era megastructure.
title: Dora 2

name: PB Burik
text: Het is de moeite waard om dit imposante gebouw te bezoeken als je de geschiedenis van Trondheim rond de tweede wereldoorlog interessant vindt.
textTranslated: It is worth visiting this imposing building if you are interested in the history of Trondheim around the Second World War.
title: Dora 2

name: Wilfred Puntman
text: Bijzondere plek in de geschiedenis. Fraai om zo'n imposant gebouw te zien. Helaas niets van het oude binnenwerk te zien. Toch goed om daar even naar toe te gaan!
textTranslated: Special place in history. Nice to see such an imposing building. Unfortunately, nothing of the old interior can be seen. Still good to go there!
title: Dora 2

name: Rasko Simovic
text: Concrete megastructure from World War II.  It is also a base for German Reich submarines in World War II.
title: Dora 2

name: Marc Debus
text: Interessant....eins der Docks ist sogar leer und man erkennt die Ausmaße der Dockboxen
textTranslated: Interesting... one of the docks is even empty and you can see the dimensions of the dock boxes
title: Dora 2

name: M Eisbär
text: Super spannender und historischer Ort. Gut zu Fuß zu erreichen
textTranslated: Super exciting and historical place. Easy to reach on foot
title: Dora 2

name: Wim Torfs
text: U-boot bunker. Niet te bezoeken. Wel indrukwekkend.
textTranslated: U-boat bunker. Not to be visited. Quite impressive.
title: Dora 2

name: Helen Robinson
text: Historic U boat hangars. They have been made into industrial units. Nothing to visit as such but interesting to know that they are there.
title: Dora 2

name: Paul Onderwater
text:
A piece of history to remember World War 2 and how Norway was occupied by the Germans for use as a base of military operations.
Take the time to read up on what Dora 1 and 2 were built for, who built it and what it was used for.  On it's own, it is just a lot of concrete.  With context it is very significant.
title: Dora 2

name: Константин Павлов
text: Бункер для ремонта и хронения подводных лодок Третьего рейха, от сюда подводные лодки уходили охотится на конвои Союзников и Советские конвои. Монументально строение.
textTranslated: A bunker for the repair and storage of submarines of the Third Reich, from here submarines left to hunt Allied and Soviet convoys. The building is monumental.
title: Dora 2

name: Terje Langlete
text: Jeg elsker dette stedet da Selfa båtbyggeri er der og de skiftet ut min gamle frontrute på min båt som er buet og ingen andre innen glass/ Lexan i Trondheims regionen kunne hjelpe meg. Tommel opp for Selfa båtbyggeri og deres ansatte mwd mange tiårs med erfaring og kunnskap. Atter en gang takk til dere og for et utmerket utført arbeide.
textTranslated: I love this place as Selfa båtbyggeri is there and they replaced my old windshield on my boat which is curved and no one else in glass/Lexan in the Trondheim region could help me. Thumbs up for Selfa båtbygeri and their employees with many decades of experience and knowledge. Once again, thank you for a job well done.
title: Dora 2

name: Stian S. Elvebakk
textTranslated: Love the way the place is dressed
title: Dora 2

name: San Jacobs
text: I explore this place regularly. I love the old industrial look.
title: Dora 2

name: Jean-Marc Rechsteiner
text: Its a historical place ... Its in the middle of the industry-zone and its not possible to walk around and see much ..
title: Dora 2
